description: Role-based AI guardrails for startup teams (2-10 people)

input_rules: Can ask anything related to business strategy and technical implementation
Full access to AI capabilities for strategic and operational decisions
Can request both high-level architecture and detailed technical guidance
output_rules: Provide comprehensive business and technical analysis
Include strategic considerations, costs, and team implications
Balance technical depth with business impact

input_rules: Can request complex code generation and architecture design
Can ask for performance optimization and debugging help
Can access advanced programming patterns and best practices
output_rules: Show advanced patterns and architectural considerations

input_rules: Can ask for code explanations and learning resources
Cannot request complex architecture decisions without guidance
Focus on building understanding rather than just getting solutions
output_rules: Include learning resources and next steps
Simplify complex concepts into digestible parts
Focus on understanding principles, not just implementation
Include comments explaining the 'why' behind code

input_rules: Can only ask basic programming and computer science questions
Cannot access advanced patterns or production-level decisions
Limited to educational content and fundamental concepts
Encouraged to ask 'why' and 'how' questions for learning
output_rules: Provide beginner-friendly explanations with extensive context
Focus on computer science fundamentals and basic programming concepts
Use simple examples with heavy commenting
Avoid advanced topics unless specifically educational
Include suggestions for foundational learning resources

usage_guidelines.senior_dev: Full technical depth and implementation guidance
usage_guidelines.intern: Foundational learning and basic concept explanation
